topic: Conditional probability on die-face sticker survival
failure_mode: Aria/Artemis disagreed, denominator logic was unstable, but Athena finalized anyway.
what_went_wrong: Reports disagree about valid sequence counts and denominator construction. The math failure is conditioning under overwrites: visible stickers are survival events, not independent face choices.
study_material: State-space conditioning for overwrite processes; survival/no-future-hit events; denominator reconstruction by explicit face-state DP.

topic: Rotated triangle and nonconvex hexagon area
failure_mode: Open geometric/arithmetic blocker became a confident final answer.
what_went_wrong: Both peer reports explicitly reported unresolved shoelace/orientation disagreement. Athena finalized from a non-closed geometry route.
study_material: Circumcenter rotation coordinates; oriented shoelace for named vertex order; validate sign and winding before nearest-integer closeout.

topic: Partitioning a 10x10 grid into rectangular cell loops
failure_mode: False uniqueness proof for nested squares.
what_went_wrong: The roles assumed the concentric-square decomposition was unique and did not enumerate strip/frame alternatives.
study_material: Transfer/backtracking enumeration of loop tilings; boundary-frame recursion; counterexample search before uniqueness claims.
v34_axis: tiling enumeration instead of uniqueness assertion

topic: Directed path count in a ladder/diagonal graph without edge reuse
failure_mode: Repeated false closeouts across every recorded AIME-2026 attempt.
what_went_wrong: The controller repeatedly accepted high-confidence wrong answers. The underlying math needs graph-state transfer because no-repeated-edge couples local choices across columns.
study_material: Transfer matrix on frontier states; directed edge-use constraints; compute N by column DP and only then take square root.

topic: Left-associative custom operation over compositions of 12
what_went_wrong: Reports compressed the process into a subtraction-sum invariant and did not enumerate accumulator states over all compositions.
study_material: Dynamic programming over partial sum, accumulator value, and parity; composition enumeration; verify invariants against DP.

topic: Ordered 7-tuples modulo 3 with cyclic cubic sum
failure_mode: Enumeration acknowledged incomplete, then Athena finalized.
what_went_wrong: Both peers reported unresolved enumeration under the mod-3 sum constraint. Athena emitted a number anyway.
study_material: Modulo-3 enumeration; condition on total sum; truth tables for cyclic cubic terms; exhaustive 3^7 or compressed DP.

failure_mode: Complete consensus on a count with a missing conjugacy-class case.
what_went_wrong: All roles counted permutations whose cycle lengths divide 6, but omitted one legal cycle type. The method was right; the partition checklist was incomplete.
study_material: Cycle-type partition checklist; conjugacy class formula; mandatory exhaustive partition ledger before final summation.

failure_mode: Peer disagreement between two degree-sorting totals; Athena selected one.
what_went_wrong: The route recognized bipartite separation but mishandled degree distribution by partition/color and assignment weights. Later runs recovered this, so it is a recoverable audit-route failure.
study_material: Checkerboard partitions on 8x8 grid; degree counts by color; rearrangement inequality with signed degree weights.

topic: Nonconvex pentagon coordinates and modular area filter
what_went_wrong: The route likely had the right coordinate family but leaked boundary cases through strict inequalities or area divisibility.
study_material: Coordinate parametrization of nonconvex pentagons; strict inequalities; modular area divisibility and endpoint audits.

topic: Circle tangent to parabola, sum of possible radii
what_went_wrong: The failed run did not consistently reduce tangency to normal-distance conditions and sum all real radii. A later selected run solved it.
study_material: Parabola normal parametrization; distance-to-center radius equation; discriminant/root-sum finish.

topic: Isosceles triangle incenter and integer side constraints
failure_mode: Open trig/number-theory blocker finalized as a candidate.
what_went_wrong: Peer reports identified a bad half-angle/inradius formula and unresolved integer constraints. The final answer was emitted despite no closed Diophantine route.
study_material: Incenter perimeter formulas; half-angle identities; integer side constraints; rationality checks before minimization.

failure_mode: Consensus on coefficient extraction with floor/carry error.
what_went_wrong: The model extracted late coefficients but mishandled the tail/floor carry. The tail must be bounded tightly enough to know the floor modulo 1000.
study_material: Series coefficient extraction; tail bounds; floor carry audit under multiplication by 10^100.

topic: Counting cousin sets for finite integer sets
failure_mode: Capacity lower bound mistaken for exact-achievability proof.
what_went_wrong: The route proved a lower bound and enough capacity, then invented an exact construction. Exact target count requires structural counting.
study_material: Matching-count DP for neighbor choices; exact construction counts; never use capacity as existence without a constructive count.
